title: Supreme Court allows Trump to end humanitarian deportation protections
shortDescription: Getting rid of a program that's allowed hundreds of thousands to stay in the U.S. is a big part of Trump’s hardline approach to immigration.

title: Trump's mail-in voting order halted by judge, impacting fall elections
shortDescription: A federal judge blocked implementation of an executive order to tighten rules ‌for mail-in voting before fall elections to decide control of Congress.

title: Hunter Biden gives his take on NY primaries after socialist sweep
shortDescription: The former president's son said that endorsements from establishment Democrats could now be seen as damaging to campaigns.

title: Trump calls passing the SAVE America Act a “National Emergency” | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Trump wants GOP lawmakers to pass the SAVE America Act. GOP lawmakers want Trump to sign the Housing Act. Are they any closer to a compromise?

title: Trump criticizes Mamdani's choices after DSA sweep in NY primaries
shortDescription: After three Mamdani-backed candidates won their NY primaries on Tuesday, Trump criticized the mayor and socialism.

title: See Trump's approval rating amid drama with Congress over Iran, affordability
shortDescription: President Donald Trump canceled a bill signing on June 24, urging Congress to pass the SAVE America Act. But polls show unease about Iran and inflation.

title: Senate sides with Trump on Iran war after volatile meeting
shortDescription: Two Republicans changed their votes on an Iran War Powers resolution in a symbolic move that mollified Donald Trump.

title: Daily Briefing: Trump clashes with GOP Senators
shortDescription: GOP senators report yelling in meeting with Trump. Here's the news to know Thursday.

title: Long-hidden White House Rockwell paintings finally on display
shortDescription: New research on Rockwell's 1943 work reveals the real-life visitors who courted President Franklin Delano Roosevelt during World War Two.

title: Trump celebrating 250th anniversary with Mount Rushmore speech
shortDescription: The South Dakota event on July 3 is one of several 250th anniversary events centered on President Donald Trump.

title: Trump says he 'saved our country' at 250 rally. Other takeaways
shortDescription: Trump hit on familiar themes that are staples of his political rallies, all while a military band played and fighter jets flew overhead.

title: Trump admin scraps ICE detention warehouse plans after controversy
shortDescription: Federal, state and local officials across the country announced that ICE has scrapped plans to convert warehouses into detention sites.

title: Senate GOP bats down last-ditch effort to repeal new student loan caps
shortDescription: Senate Republicans batted down a measure that would've repealed new Education Department regulations implementing federal student loan caps.

title: Trump likens administration to 1776 patriots
shortDescription: President Trump likened his administration to the patriots of 1776 in remarks ahead of the Great American State Fair.

title: Trump wishes Team USA 'good luck'
shortDescription: Trump wished the U.S. Men's National Team "good luck" for the final group stage match at the World Cup against Turkey.

title: Trump pledges $2.50 gas at state fair rally
shortDescription: President Trump touted a preliminary deal with Iran to end the war, which he said would lead to lower gas prices in the U.S.

title: GOP senators report yelling in meeting with Trump
shortDescription: Sen. Bill Cassidy allegedly raised his voice at President Trump over the Iran war in a meeting, according to multiple other attendees.

title: Trump opens Great American State Fair
shortDescription: President Trump delivered remarks at the opening of the Great American State Fair, the events inaugural year.

title: Trump can't require voters to present citizenship docs to register, judge says
shortDescription: A Massachusetts federal judge ruled that President Donald Trump's requirement on documenting citizenship in voter registration exceeded his authority.

title: Housing is just one affordability issue on the ballot in November
shortDescription: A Trump-signed Housing Act would hand GOP lawmakers—and Democrats—a shared campaign victory before midterms.

title: GOP senator says he lost his temper at Trump in closed-door meeting
shortDescription: "I lost my temper," Cassidy told reporters. "It's the Irish in me."

title: Trump responds to housing bill
shortDescription: Trump weighs in on the housing bill, arguing lower interest rates are key to improving affordability.

title: Trump calls Mamdani ally a 'communist'
shortDescription: President Trump called a New York congressional candidate endorsed by NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani a "communist" after her primary victory.

title: Trump touts US as 'hottest country' at Great American State Fair rally
shortDescription: Trump's rally kicking off the Great American State Fair was planned as a concert series until most musicians dropped out. The show went on anyway.

title: Key takeaways from primary elections
shortDescription: Candidates endorsed by New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani won three Democratic congressional primaries.
